description: A network analytics specification document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/interface_groups_spec.txt. The document defines two dynamic interface groups that need to be created in OpManager to aggregate WAN uplinks and datacenter trunks automatically. Review the document and implement the two Interface Groups with their exact specified criteria (Settings > Configuration > Groups, then select Interface Groups). Use 'Match Any' (OR) logic for the criteria. Application credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
